method: Claude Code subagents (read-only profile, cheapest model tier); usage summed from provider usage fields in each child transcript (subagents/agent-*.jsonl); one run per arm; fixture 4000-line log; oracle = 100 ERROR lines + CRITICAL-MARKER line 3777 verbatim

team_three_workers.note: 33+33+34 errors summed by controller; marker found by worker 3

raw_full_read_child.note: counted 99 of 100 ERROR lines and broke the return format

findings: child bootstrap ~44k cache-write on this host vs ~11k Codex assumption
simultaneous fan-out: four identical prefixes paid four separate cache writes; stagger spawn for reuse
team = 3.0x gross input of single projection child for the same oracle
raw read = 14.2x gross input and wrong answer
marginal uncached input per worker: 36 tokens
caveats: one run per arm, no confidence interval
usage fields are provider token classes, not billing claims
single host, single provider, cheapest model tier
